# SmoothSend

SmoothSend is a gasless stablecoin payment protocol for Web3 developers.
It enables USDC and USDT transfers on Aptos, Arbitrum, Base, and Avalanche
without requiring users to hold native gas tokens (ETH, AVAX, or APT).

SmoothSend uses ERC-4337 account abstraction on EVM chains (Arbitrum, Base,
Avalanche) and Aptos native sponsored transactions. A small fee is deducted
from the sent token amount. Testnet is free.

## SDK

npm package: @smoothsend/sdk
Install: npm install @smoothsend/sdk
https://www.npmjs.com/package/@smoothsend/sdk

## Documentation

https://docs.smoothsend.xyz

## Dashboard (API Keys)

https://dashboard.smoothsend.xyz

## dApps

- EVM (Arbitrum, Base, Avalanche): https://evm.smoothsend.xyz
- Aptos: https://aptos.smoothsend.xyz

https://github.com/smoothsend
